free_text: Excitation functions and yields for cyclotron
production of radiorhenium via deuteron irradiation-
reactions and tests on the production of RE-186-g using
Thick natural W-metal foils except one target, which
was made of enriched to 99.9% W-186, W-180 less than
The stack irradiated at 18.0 MeV contained four
43.7+-0.2 mg/cm**2 ( approx. 20 mum) thick W-nat foils
while the others, irradiated at 15.0, 13.0 and 11.0 MeV
with a typical overall relative type A error of 4.5%.
Uncertainty on the mean energy in each foil
includes the energy uncertainty of the extracted beam,
the uncertainties in the mean mass thicknesses and the
beam energy straggling through the targets.
